comment: Redstone-active overlay for the Craft Requester. Inherits all geometry from `nodeworks:block/craft_requester` and only overrides the `#0` texture binding to point at craft_requester_redstone_active.png. Shown alongside the network-colour emissive overlay while the input signal is high (debounced via `signalActive`); the two textures don't overlap so they stack cleanly.
